title: thalictrum minus proles collinum
intro: Thalictrum minus proles collinum, also known as the meadow rue, is a flowering perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of meadow rue include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. Meadow rue can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
